creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Updating port print/texlive-base (revision 396352) fails with the follwoing error:


[...]

===>>> Continuing initial dependency check for print/texlive-base

===>>> print/xpdfopen seems to depend on print/texlive-base
       which looks like a dependency loop

===>>> Try pkg_updating print/texlive-base
===>>> Aborting update

===>>> Update for texlive-base-20150521_4 failed
===>>> Aborting update
